name: Schottky Diode
shortDescription: A Schottky diode is formed by a metal-semiconductor junction, giving a low forward voltage drop and very fast switching.
whatIsIt: A Schottky diode is formed by a metal-semiconductor junction, giving a low forward voltage drop and very fast switching.
whyExists: Its low V_F reduces power loss and its speed suits high-frequency and switching-power applications.
whereUsed: They are used in switch-mode power supplies, Radio Frequency (RF) detectors, and as rectifiers in low-voltage circuits.
